hero.title: TwIdValidator
hero.subtitle: Taiwan national ID, BAN and mobile phone validation — auto-detection of all three ID kinds, detailed parse results, test-data generation. Zero dependencies, thread-safe.

threeIds.title: All Three ID Kinds
threeIds.desc: National ID, new-style UI number (2021+) and old-style ARC number auto-detected, with gender and household region parsing.

ban.title: 2021 BAN Rule
ban.desc: Full support for the April 2021 checksum rule (multiple of 5) and the 7th-digit-7 special case.

phone.title: Phone Validation + Normalize
phone.desc: Strict 10-digit 09 check; TryNormalize handles +886, spaces, dashes, parentheses and full-width digits.

generator.title: Test-data Generator
generator.desc: Generates checksum-valid sample numbers, reproducible with a seed; format-valid only, never real persons.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Pick a topic below to get started with TwIdValidator.
docs.wip: Page content coming soon — see README.md in the GitHub repo.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.intro: See docs/en/changelog.md in the GitHub repo for the full history.

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.intro: If TwIdValidator helps you, consider sponsoring the developer via cryptocurrency or Binance Pay.

usdt.title: USDT (BEP20)
usdt.warningTitle: BSC (Binance Smart Chain / BEP20) network only
usdt.warningBody: Sending to other networks (ERC20 / TRC20 / Solana, etc.) will result in permanent loss of funds.

binancePay.title: Binance Pay
binancePay.desc: Scan to sponsor via Binance Pay
